title: NoikzFly
body:
[![Available on Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c132706a07fd758c708f927af8cc04d673fced76.png)](https://modrinth.com/plugin/noikzfly)
[![Available on SpigotMC](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c0dccc5621e99c185091a784c6474bbe0506fa0.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/noikzfly.98316/)

A fly plugin for Minecraft 1.20-26.1.2

Sadly only the [SpigotMC version](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/noikzfly.98316/) has a updatechecker :/ (Due to me not knowing how to fix one for Modrinth)

# Commands:
- /fly - Activates/Deactivates fly. | Permission: noikzfly.fly
- /noikzfly - The plugins main command. | Permission: noikzfly.use
- /noikzfly reload - Reloads the config.yml. | Permission: noikzfly.reload
- /flyspeed - Changes your flyspeed | Permission: noikzfly.flyspeed

# Planned:
- Save flight state between play sessions
